stemHtml: The notification phase (LOG ON) is a FANS application which consists in transmitting aircraft information and…

options.a: associated datalink capability, prior to operating any datalink communications with ATC.
options.b: park stand to the airport pre-flight controller to request the datalink pre-departure clearance (PDC).
options.c: aircraft position to the airport ground controller to request the datalink taxi clearance.
options.d: aircraft position to request the datalink clearance to enter an airspace.
